description: Rigol DSA815 spectrum analyzer. Frequency range 9 kHz to 1.5 GHz; minimum RBW 10 Hz. Member of the Rigol DSA800 series; controlled by SCPI commands over USB or LAN. Shares the DSA800 SCPI command set with the DSA832/DSA832E/DSA875 (the models differ only in frequency range).
source: DSA800_UserGuide.pdf + Rigol DSA800 Series Programming Guide SCPI reference (rigol.com)

identity.description: Standard SCPI identification query; returns manufacturer (Rigol Technologies), model (DSA815), serial number and firmware version.

commands.name: idn
commands.description: Query the instrument identification string (manufacturer, model, serial number, firmware version).

commands.name: rst
commands.description: Restore the instrument to its factory default state.

commands.name: cls
commands.description: Clear all the event registers and the error queue.

commands.name: ese
commands.description: Set or query the enable register for the standard event status register.

commands.name: esr
commands.description: Query and clear the standard event status register.

commands.name: opc
commands.description: Set the operation complete bit (bit 0) in the standard event status register after the current operation finishes; the query form returns 1 when all pending operations are complete.

commands.name: sre
commands.description: Set or query the enable register for the status byte register.

commands.name: stb
commands.description: Query the status byte register (read without clearing).

commands.name: wai
commands.description: Wait until all pending operations are complete before executing any further commands.

commands.name: tst
commands.description: Perform a self-test and query the result.

commands.name: system_error
commands.description: Query and clear the latest error message from the error queue (returns error code and message).

commands.name: system_preset
commands.description: Recall the preset setting and restore the analyzer to the specified preset state.

commands.name: system_version
commands.description: Query the SCPI version number with which the instrument complies.

commands.name: frequency_center
commands.description: Set or query the center frequency of the analyzer.

parameters.name: <freq>
parameters.range: 0 Hz to 1.5 GHz (50 Hz to 1.5 GHz minus 50 Hz in non-zero span). Default 750 MHz. Accepts MIN/MAX/UP/DOWN.

commands.name: frequency_span
commands.description: Set or query the frequency span of the analyzer. Setting the span to 0 Hz selects zero span mode.

parameters.name: <span>
parameters.range: 0 Hz, or 100 Hz to 1.5 GHz. Default = full span. Accepts MIN/MAX/UP/DOWN.

commands.name: frequency_span_full
commands.description: Set the analyzer to the full frequency span.

commands.name: frequency_start
commands.description: Set or query the start frequency of the analyzer.

parameters.name: <freq>
parameters.range: 0 Hz to 1.5 GHz (0 Hz to 1.5 GHz minus 100 Hz in non-zero span). Default 0 Hz. Accepts MIN/MAX/UP/DOWN.

commands.name: frequency_stop
commands.description: Set or query the stop frequency of the analyzer.

parameters.name: <freq>
parameters.range: 0 Hz to 1.5 GHz (100 Hz to 1.5 GHz in non-zero span). Default 1.5 GHz. Accepts MIN/MAX/UP/DOWN.

commands.name: frequency_center_step
commands.description: Set or query the center frequency step size used by UP/DOWN tuning.

commands.name: frequency_center_step_auto
commands.description: Enable or disable automatic setting of the center frequency step size, or query its status.

commands.name: power_rlevel
commands.description: Set or query the reference level (the amplitude shown at the top graticule line).

commands.name: power_rlevel_offset
commands.description: Set or query the reference level offset, compensating for gains or losses between the device under test and the analyzer input.

commands.name: power_pdivision
commands.description: Set or query the vertical scale per division (logarithmic amplitude scale).

parameters.name: <value>
parameters.range: 0.1 dB to 20 dB per division. Default 10 dB.

commands.name: power_spacing
commands.description: Set or query the vertical scale type (logarithmic or linear).

commands.name: power_attenuation
commands.description: Set or query the input (front-end) RF attenuation.

parameters.name: <value>
parameters.range: 0 dB to 30 dB, in 5 dB steps. Default 10 dB.

commands.name: power_attenuation_auto
commands.description: Enable or disable automatic coupling of the input attenuation to the reference level, or query its status.

commands.name: power_gain
commands.description: Turn the internal preamplifier on or off, or query its status.

commands.name: bandwidth_resolution
commands.description: Set or query the resolution bandwidth (RBW).

parameters.name: <bandwidth>
parameters.range: 10 Hz to 1 MHz in 1-3-10 sequence (Gauss filter). Default 1 MHz. Accepts MIN/MAX/UP/DOWN.

commands.name: bandwidth_resolution_auto
commands.description: Enable or disable automatic coupling of the resolution bandwidth to the span, or query its status.

commands.name: bandwidth_video
commands.description: Set or query the video bandwidth (VBW).

parameters.name: <bandwidth>
parameters.range: 1 Hz to 3 MHz in 1-3-10 sequence. Default 1 MHz. Accepts MIN/MAX/UP/DOWN.

commands.name: bandwidth_video_auto
commands.description: Enable or disable automatic coupling of the video bandwidth to the resolution bandwidth, or query its status.

commands.name: bandwidth_vbw_rbw_ratio
commands.description: Set or query the ratio of the video bandwidth to the resolution bandwidth (VBW/RBW).

commands.name: sweep_time
commands.description: Set or query the sweep time of the analyzer.

parameters.name: <time>
parameters.range: Depends on the current span, RBW and VBW. Accepts MIN/MAX/UP/DOWN.

commands.name: sweep_time_auto
commands.description: Enable or disable automatic setting of the sweep time, or query its status.

commands.name: sweep_count
commands.description: Set or query the number of sweeps for a single sweep sequence.

commands.name: initiate_continuous
commands.description: Set or query the sweep mode: continuous (ON) or single (OFF).

commands.name: initiate_immediate
commands.description: Initiate a sweep. In single sweep mode this triggers one sweep (or one sweep sequence of SWEep:COUNt sweeps).

commands.name: initiate_pause
commands.description: Pause the sweep or measurement that is in progress.

commands.name: initiate_resume
commands.description: Restart the sweep or measurement that is in progress.

commands.name: abort
commands.description: Restart the current sweep or measurement, aborting the one in progress.

commands.name: detector_function
commands.description: Set or query the detector type used to process the captured data of each trace point.

parameters.name: <type>
parameters.range: {NEGative|POSitive|SAMPle|NORMal|RMS|VAVerage|QPEak} (Neg Peak, Pos Peak, Sample, Normal, RMS Avg, Voltage Avg, Quasi-Peak). Default POSitive.

commands.name: trace_mode
commands.description: Set or query the type (mode) of the specified trace.

commands.name: trace_data
commands.description: Query the amplitude data of the specified trace (returns the trace point values).

commands.name: trace_average_count
commands.description: Set or query the number of averages for trace averaging.

commands.name: trace_average_clear
commands.description: Clear (restart) the trace averaging, resetting the average count.

commands.name: calculate_marker_state
commands.description: Turn the specified marker on or off, or query its status.

commands.name: calculate_marker_mode
commands.description: Set or query the type of the specified marker.

commands.name: calculate_marker_x
commands.description: Set or query the X-axis position (frequency, or time in zero span) of the specified marker.

parameters.name: <freq>
parameters.range: Within the current X-axis range (0 Hz to 1.5 GHz in frequency domain).

commands.name: calculate_marker_y
commands.description: Query the Y-axis value (amplitude) of the specified marker.

commands.name: calculate_marker_maximum
commands.description: Perform a peak search, placing the specified marker on the maximum amplitude point of the trace.

commands.name: calculate_marker_max_next
commands.description: Place the specified marker on the next peak (next highest amplitude) of the trace.

commands.name: calculate_marker_ptpeak
commands.description: Perform a peak-to-peak search with the specified marker (difference between maximum and minimum).

commands.name: calculate_marker_set_center
commands.description: Set the center frequency of the analyzer to the frequency of the specified marker (marker-to-center).

commands.name: calculate_marker_all_off
commands.description: Turn off all the markers.

commands.name: trigger_source
commands.description: Set or query the trigger source of the analyzer.

commands.name: calculate_bandwidth_state
commands.description: Turn the N dB bandwidth measurement function on or off, or query its status.

commands.name: configure_acpower
commands.description: Select and configure the Adjacent Channel Power (ACP) measurement.

commands.name: measure_chpower
commands.description: Query the channel power measurement result.

commands.name: hcopy_sdump_data
commands.description: Query the screen image (screenshot) of the analyzer as an IEEE 488.2 binary block (bitmap data).
